notes: Two-leg AUDCAD/EURUSD FX cointegration basket from the 2026-07-06 extended screen. The row is the only unbuilt formal survivor: both half-sample ADF tests pass, hedge sign is stable, half-life is 51.4 days, and the rolling-z excursion count is 43. The v3 fixed-hedge trade check is OOS-negative, so this is an exploratory Q02 evidence row.

The scan hedge used for mechanization is positive (0.5301), so the EA trades the second leg with sign(-beta) direction: long spread means long AUDCAD and short EURUSD, short spread means short AUDCAD and long EURUSD.
USDCAD.DWX is declared for conversion/history warmup under a USD tester account; only AUDCAD.DWX and EURUSD.DWX are traded.
